# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-a
spec:
  routes:
    - hosts:
        - service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
      port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: service-b
spec:
  routes:
    - hosts:
        - service-c.default.svc.cluster.local
      port: 8081
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-a-authorization
spec:
  server: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
  destinations:
    - port: 8080
      hosts:
        - service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-b-authorization
spec:
  server: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
  destinations:
    - port: 8081
      hosts:
        - service-c.default.svc.cluster.local
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: service-c-authorization
spec:
  server: service-c.default.svc.cluster.local
  destinations: []
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: service-a-sa
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: service-b-sa
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: service-c-sa
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service-a-destination
spec:
  destination:
    host: service-a.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 8080
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: DISABLED
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: service-b-destination
spec:
  destination:
    host: service-b.default.svc.cluster.local
    port: 8081
  trafficPolicy:
    tls:
      mode: DISABLED
